title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 졸업 축하해요. 이 꽃 받으세요. 
여자: 고마워요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Chúc mừng cô đã tốt nghiệp. Hãy nhận lấy bó hoa này nhé. 
Nữ: Cảm ơn anh.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Félicitations pour votre diplôme. Veuillez prendre ce bouquet de fleurs.
Femme : Merci.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Felicidades por tu graduación. Por favor, toma este ramo de flores.
Mujer: Gracias.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Selamat atas kelulusanmu. Silakan ambil buket bunga ini.
Wanita: Terima kasih.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：卒業おめでとう。この花束を受け取ってください。
女性: ありがとう。

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Herzlichen Glückwunsch zum Abschluss. Bitte nimm diesen Blumenstrauß.
Frau: Danke.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：恭喜你毕业。请收下这束鲜花。
女：谢谢。

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：恭喜你畢業。請收下這束鮮花。
女：謝謝。

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Congratulazioni per la tua laurea. Per favore, prendi questo bouquet di fiori.
Donna: Grazie.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Поздравляю с выпуском. Пожалуйста, возьмите этот букет цветов.
Женщина: Спасибо.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ยินดีด้วยกับการสำเร็จการศึกษาของคุณ กรุณารับช่อดอกไม้นี้
ผู้หญิง: ขอบคุณ.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Parabéns pela sua formatura. Por favor, leve este buquê de flores.
Mulher: Obrigada.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: आपके ग्रेजुएशन पर बधाई. कृपया यह पुष्प गुलदस्ता ले लें।
महिला: धन्यवाद.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Mezuniyetini tebrik ederim. Lütfen bu çiçek buketini alın.
Kadın: Teşekkür ederim.

#######

Man: Congratulations on your graduation. Please take this flower bouquet.
Woman: Thank you.

explain.vi: Bối cảnh là nhân vật nam bảo nhân vật nữ nhận hoa vào lễ tốt nghiệp nên bức tranh 1 là phù hợp nhất.
explain.en: The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.fr:
L'homme a dit à la femme de recevoir des fleurs lors de la cérémonie de remise des diplômes, donc 1 est la bonne réponse.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.es:
El hombre le dijo a la mujer que recibiera flores en la ceremonia de graduación, entonces 1 es la respuesta correcta.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.id:
Pria itu menyuruh wanita itu untuk menerima bunga di upacara wisuda, jadi 1 adalah jawaban yang benar.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.ja:
男性は女性に卒業式で花をもらうように言ったので、1が正解です。

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.de:
Der Mann sagte der Frau, sie solle bei der Abschlussfeier Blumen bekommen, also ist 1 die richtige Antwort.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.zh-CN:
男子让女子在毕业典礼上接受鲜花，所以1是正确答案。

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.zh-TW:
男子讓女子在畢業典禮上接受鮮花，所以1是正確答案。

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.it:
L'uomo ha detto alla donna di ricevere dei fiori alla cerimonia di laurea, quindi 1 è la risposta corretta.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.ru:
Мужчина посоветовал женщине подарить цветы на выпускной церемонии, поэтому правильный ответ — 1.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.th:
ผู้ชายบอกให้ผู้หญิงไปรับดอกไม้ในพิธีรับปริญญา ดังนั้น 1 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.pt:
O homem disse à mulher para receber flores na cerimônia de formatura, então 1 é a resposta correta.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.hi:
पुरुष ने महिला को स्नातक समारोह में फूल प्राप्त करने के लिए कहा, इसलिए 1 सही उत्तर है।

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.
explain.tr:
Adam mezuniyet töreninde kadına çiçek almasını söylediğine göre doğru cevap 1'dir.

#######

The man told the woman to receive flowers at the graduation ceremony, so 1 is the correct answer.

title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: (약간 멀리서 말하는 느낌) 유미 씨, 빨리 오세요. 
여자: 잠깐만요. 오랜만에 자전거를 타니까 잘 못 타겠어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: (Cảm giác giọng nói phát ra từ khá xa) Cô Yumi, mau đến đây nào. 
Nữ: Đợi tôi một chút. Lâu rồi không đạp xe đạp nên tôi đạp không được tốt lắm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : (Se sentant un peu loin) Yumi, viens vite ici.
Femme : Attendez une minute. Cela fait longtemps que je n'ai pas fait de vélo, donc je ne peux pas bien le conduire.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: (Sintiéndose un poco lejos) Yumi, ven aquí rápido.
Mujer: Espera un minuto. Ha pasado mucho tiempo desde que monté una bicicleta, así que no puedo andar bien.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria : (Merasa agak jauh) Yumi, cepat kemari.
Wanita: Tunggu sebentar. Sudah lama saya tidak naik sepeda, jadi saya tidak bisa mengendarainya dengan baik.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：（少し遠い気がして）ユミ、早く来て。
女：ちょっと待って。久しぶりに自転車に乗ったのでうまく乗れません。

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: (fühlt sich etwas weit weg) Yumi, komm schnell her.
Frau: Moment mal. Es ist lange her, dass ich Fahrrad gefahren bin, also kann ich es nicht gut fahren.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：（感觉有点远）Yumi，快过来。
女：等一下。好久没骑自行车了，骑的不太好。

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：（感覺有點遠）Yumi，快過來。
女：等一下。好久沒騎自行車了，騎的不太好。

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: (Sentendosi un po' lontano) Yumi, vieni qui presto.
Donna: Aspetta un attimo. È passato molto tempo dall'ultima volta che ho guidato una bicicletta, quindi non posso guidarla bene.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: (чувствуя себя отстраненным) Юми, иди скорее сюда.
Женщина: Подожди минутку. Я давно не катался на велосипеде, поэтому плохо на нем езжу.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: (รู้สึกห่างออกไปนิดหน่อย) ยูมิ มานี่เร็วเข้า
ผู้หญิง: รอสักครู่. ฉันขี่จักรยานมานานแล้ว เลยขี่ได้ไม่ดีนัก

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: (sentindo-se um pouco distante) Yumi, venha aqui rápido.
Mulher: Espere um minuto. Já faz muito tempo que não ando de bicicleta, então não consigo andar bem.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: (थोड़ा दूर महसूस करते हुए) युमी, जल्दी से यहाँ आओ।
महिला: एक मिनट रुको. मुझे साइकिल चलाते हुए काफी समय हो गया है, इसलिए मैं इसे ठीक से चला नहीं पाता।

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: (Biraz uzaklaşmış gibi hissederek) Yumi, çabuk buraya gel.
Kadın: Dur bir dakika. Bisiklete binmeyeli uzun zaman oldu, bu yüzden onu pek iyi süremiyorum.

#######

Man: (Feeling a bit far away) Yumi, come here quickly.
Woman: Wait a minute. It's been a long time since I've ridden a bicycle, so I can't ride it well.

explain.vi: Hai người này đạp xe cùng nhau và bạn nam bảo bạn nữ đi nhanh lên (có nghĩa là bạn nam đang đi trước) nên bức tranh 3 là phù hợp nhất.
explain.en: Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.fr:
Deux personnages font du vélo ensemble. L'homme dit à la femme de se dépêcher (cela signifie que l'homme roule devant), donc 3 est correct.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.es:
Dos personajes andan en bicicleta juntos. El hombre le dice a la mujer que se dé prisa (significa que el hombre va adelante), por lo que 3 es correcto.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.id:
Dua karakter sedang mengendarai sepeda bersama. Laki-laki itu menyuruh perempuan untuk bergegas (artinya laki-laki itu mendahului), jadi 3 benar.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.ja:
2 人のキャラクターが一緒に自転車に乗っています。男性は女性に急いでください（男性が先に乗っていることを意味します）と言うので、3が正解です。

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.de:
Zwei Charaktere fahren zusammen Fahrrad. Der Mann sagt der Frau, sie solle sich beeilen (es bedeutet, dass der Mann vorausfährt), also ist 3 richtig.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.zh-CN:
两个角色一起骑自行车。男人叫女人快点（意思是男人骑在前面），所以3是正确的。

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.zh-TW:
兩個角色一起騎自行車。男人叫女人快點（意思是男人騎在前面），所以3是正確的。

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.it:
Due personaggi vanno in bicicletta insieme. L'uomo dice alla donna di sbrigarsi (significa che l'uomo sta guidando avanti), quindi 3 è corretto.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.ru:
Два персонажа вместе катаются на велосипедах. Мужчина говорит женщине, чтобы она поторопилась (это означает, что мужчина едет впереди), поэтому верно 3.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.th:
ตัวละครสองตัวกำลังขี่จักรยานด้วยกัน ผู้ชายบอกให้ผู้หญิงรีบไป (หมายความว่าผู้ชายกำลังขี่ไปข้างหน้า) ดังนั้น 3 จึงถูกต้อง

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.pt:
Dois personagens estão andando de bicicleta juntos. O homem diz à mulher para se apressar (significa que o homem está na frente), então 3 está correto.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.hi:
दो पात्र एक साथ बाइक चला रहे हैं। पुरुष महिला से कहता है कि जल्दी करो (इसका मतलब है कि पुरुष आगे चल रहा है), इसलिए 3 सही है।

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.
explain.tr:
İki karakter birlikte bisiklete biniyor. Adam kadına acele etmesini söyler (bu, erkeğin önde olduğu anlamına gelir), yani 3 doğrudur.

#######

Two characters are riding bikes together. The man tells the woman to be hurry up (it means the man is riding ahead), so 3 is correct.

title: [15～16]다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 무거우시죠? 제가 도와 드릴까요? 
여자: 감사합니다. 문 좀 열어 주시겠어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Có nặng không? Để tôi giúp cô một tay nhé? 
Nữ: Cảm ơn anh. Anh mở giúp tôi cái cửa được không?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : C'est lourd ? Puis-je vous donner un coup de main ?
Femme : Merci. Pourriez-vous s'il vous plaît ouvrir la porte?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Es pesado? ¿Puedo echarte una mano?
Mujer: Gracias. ¿Podrías abrir la puerta, por favor?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Apakah berat? Bolehkah saya membantu Anda?
Wanita: Terima kasih. Bisa tolong buka pintunya?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男：重いですか？手を貸してもいいですか？
女性: ありがとう。ドアを開けていただけますか？

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ist es schwer? Darf ich Ihnen zur Hand gehen?
Frau: Danke. Könnten Sie bitte die Tür öffnen?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：重吗？我可以帮您一把吗？
女：谢谢。你能开门吗？

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：重嗎？我可以幫您一把嗎？
女：謝謝。你能開門嗎？

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: è pesante? Posso darti una mano?
Donna: Grazie. Potrebbe per favore aprire la porta?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Он тяжелый? Могу я дать тебе руку?
Женщина: Спасибо. Не могли бы вы открыть дверь?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย : หนักมั้ย? ฉันขอจับมือคุณได้ไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ขอบคุณ. กรุณาเปิดประตูหน่อยได้ไหม?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: É pesado? Posso te dar uma mão?
Mulher: Obrigada. Você poderia, por favor, abrir a porta?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: क्या यह भारी है? क्या मैं तुम्हें एक हाथ दे सकता हूँ?
महिला: धन्यवाद. क्या आप कृपया दरवाज़ा खोल सकते हैं?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Ağır mı? Sana yardım edebilir miyim?
Kadın: Teşekkür ederim. Lütfen kapıyı açar mısınız?

#######

Man: Is it heavy? May I give you a hand?
Woman: Thank you. Could you please open the door?

explain.vi: Người phụ nữ nhờ người đàn ông mở cửa, tức là cửa đang đóng nên bức tranh 2 là phù hợp nhất.
explain.en: The woman asked the man to open the door, which means the door is closed, so 2 is correct.
explain.fr:
La femme a demandé à l'homme d'ouvrir la porte, ce qui signifie que la porte est fermée, donc 2 est correct.

#######

The woman asked the man to open the door, which means the door is closed, so 2 is correct.
explain.es:
La mujer le pidió al hombre que abriera la puerta, lo que significa que la puerta está cerrada, por lo que 2 es correcto.

#######

The woman asked the man to open the door, which means the door is closed, so 2 is correct.
explain.id:

general.g_text_audio:

general.g_text_audio:

남자: 고마워요. 저녁에 생일 파티가 있으니까 꼭 오세요.
여자: 미안해요. 파티에는 못 갈 것 같아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Cảm ơn cậu. Tối nay tớ có tổ chức tiệc sinh nhật nên cậu nhất định phải tới đấy.
Nữ: Xin lỗi cậu. Chắc là tớ không tới bữa tiệc được rồi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Happy birthday to you! This is my gift.
Man: Thank you. I have a birthday party tonight, so please come.
Woman: I'm sorry. I don't think I can go to the party.

Femme : Joyeux anniversaire ! C'est mon cadeau.

Femme : Je suis désolée. Je ne pense pas pouvoir aller à la fête.

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

g_text_audio_translate.en:

title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 그림 멋있네요. 산하고 진짜 똑같아요.
남자: 그렇지요? 이 그림을 보면 산이 눈 앞에 있는 것 같아요.
여자: 다음에 다른 전시회도 또 보러 가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bức tranh này thật đẹp. Rất giống núi thật.
Nam: Đúng không? Nhìn bức tranh mà tôi thấy núi như đang ở ngay trước mắt tôi.
Nữ: Lần sau đi xem thêm các triển lãm khác đi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: This is a nice painting. It's the same as a mountain.
Man: Right? Looking at this picture, I think the mountain is right in front of me.
Woman: Let's go to another exhibition next time.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : C'est une belle peinture. C'est la même chose qu'une montagne.
Homme : D'accord ? En regardant cette photo, je pense que la montagne est juste devant moi.
Femme : Allons à une autre exposition la prochaine fois.

#######

Woman: This is a nice painting. It's the same as a mountain.
Man: Right? Looking at this picture, I think the mountain is right in front of me.
Woman: Let's go to another exhibition next time.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Esta es una bonita pintura. Es lo mismo que una montaña.
Hombre: ¿Verdad? Mirando esta imagen, creo que la montaña está justo frente a mí.
Mujer: La próxima vez vamos a otra exposición.

#######

Woman: This is a nice painting. It's the same as a mountain.
Man: Right? Looking at this picture, I think the mountain is right in front of me.

Wanita: Mari kita pergi ke pameran lain kali.

Woman: This is a nice painting. It's the same as a mountain.

#######

Woman: This is a nice painting. It's the same as a mountain.

general.g_text_audio:

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Sir, how can I help you?
Man: I came to fix the computer. This computer doesn't make any sound.

Homme : Je suis venu réparer l'ordinateur. Cet ordinateur n'émet aucun son.

title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 여기까지 와 주셔서 감사해요.
여자: 아니에요. 민호 씨 입학식인데 꼭 와야죠. 이건 입학 선물이에요.
남자: 정말 고마워요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cảm ơn cậu vì đã đến tận đây.
Nữ: Không có gì. Đây là lễ nhập học của Min Ho nên chắc chắn mình phải đến rồi. Đây là quà nhập học.
Nam: Thực sự cảm ơn cậu.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Thanks for coming here.
Woman: It's nothing. It's Min Ho's entrance ceremony so I definitely have to come. This is a school entrance gift.
Man: Thank you very much.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Merci d'être venu ici.
Femme : Ce n'est rien. C'est la cérémonie d'entrée de Min Ho donc je dois absolument venir. Ceci est un cadeau d'entrée à l'école.
Homme : Merci beaucoup.

#######

Man: Thanks for coming here.
Woman: It's nothing. It's Min Ho's entrance ceremony so I definitely have to come. This is a school entrance gift.
Man: Thank you very much.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Gracias por venir aquí.
Mujer: No es nada. Es la ceremonia de entrada de Min Ho, así que definitivamente tengo que ir. Este es un regalo de entrada a la escuela.
Hombre: Muchas gracias.

#######

Man: Thanks for coming here.
Woman: It's nothing. It's Min Ho's entrance ceremony so I definitely have to come. This is a school entrance gift.

g_text_audio_translate.id:

Wanita: Bukan apa-apa. Ini upacara masuk Min Ho jadi saya pasti harus datang. Ini adalah hadiah masuk sekolah.
Pria: Terima kasih banyak.

#######

Man: Thanks for coming here.

general.g_text_audio:

Wanita: Ya, Minsu, kamu membeli hadiah, kan? Sekarang masuk.

title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 아직도 일하세요? 이쪽으로 가서 주스 좀 드세요.
남자: 네, 잠깐만요. 갈게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Bây giờ anh vẫn còn làm việc sao? Qua bên đây uống chút nước ép đi.
Nam: Vâng, đợi một lát. Tôi đi ngay.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.
Man: Yeah, wait a minute. I will go now.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Vous travaillez toujours ? Viens ici et bois du jus.
Homme : Oui, attendez une minute. Je vais y aller maintenant.

#######

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.
Man: Yeah, wait a minute. I will go now.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Sigues trabajando? Ve aquí y toma un poco de jugo.
Hombre: Sí, espera un minuto. Iré ahora.

#######

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.
Man: Yeah, wait a minute. I will go now.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah Anda masih bekerja? Pergi ke sini dan minum jus.
Pria: Ya, tunggu sebentar. Aku akan pergi sekarang.

#######

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.
Man: Yeah, wait a minute. I will go now.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女：まだ働いてるの？ここに来て、ジュースを飲んでください。
男：うん、ちょっと待って。もう行くね。

#######

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.
Man: Yeah, wait a minute. I will go now.

Mann: Ja, Moment mal. Ich werde jetzt gehen.

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.

男：是的，等一下。我要走了。

#######

Woman: Are you still working? Go over here and have some juice.

Homem: Sim, espere um minuto. Eu vou agora.

title: [15～16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 산에 올아오니까 공기가 좀 좋죠? 
여자: (좀 쉬고) 그런데 금방 비가 올 것 같은데요. 하늘이 어두워져요.
남자: 그러게요. 가방 메고 빨리 내려가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Lên núi nên không khí tốt nhỉ?
Nữ: (Nghỉ một lát) Nhưng hình như sắp mưa. Bầu trời đang tối dần rồi.
Nam: Đúng thật. Đeo balo rồi mau xuống núi thôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Coming up to the mountain, the air is nice, isn't it?
Woman: (Stops for a while) But it looks like it's going to rain soon. The sky is dark.
Man: That's true. Put on the bag and go down quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : En montant à la montagne, l'air est agréable, n'est-ce pas ?
Femme : (s'arrête un moment) Mais il semble qu'il va bientôt pleuvoir. Le ciel est sombre.
Homme : C'est vrai. Mettez le sac et descendez rapidement.

#######

Man: Coming up to the mountain, the air is nice, isn't it?
Woman: (Stops for a while) But it looks like it's going to rain soon. The sky is dark.
Man: That's true. Put on the bag and go down quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Subiendo a la montaña, el aire es agradable, ¿no?
Mujer: (Se detiene un rato) Pero parece que va a llover pronto. El cielo está oscuro.
Hombre: Eso es verdad. Ponte la bolsa y baja rápidamente.

#######

Man: Coming up to the mountain, the air is nice, isn't it?
Woman: (Stops for a while) But it looks like it's going to rain soon. The sky is dark.
Man: That's true. Put on the bag and go down quickly.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Naik ke gunung, udaranya bagus, bukan?
Wanita: (Berhenti sebentar) Tapi sepertinya akan segera turun hujan. Langit gelap.
Pria: Itu benar. Taruh di tas dan turun dengan cepat.

#######

Man: Coming up to the mountain, the air is nice, isn't it?

男：そうですね。バッグをかぶってさっさと下山。

#######

Man: Coming up to the mountain, the air is nice, isn't it?

title: 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 아....... 커피를 쏟았네요. 휴지 있어요?
남자: 잠깐 기다리세요. 제가 휴지를 가지고 올게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Chờ một chút. Tôi sẽ mang khăn giấy đến.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Oh... ho rovesciato il caffè. Hai dei tessuti?
Uomo: Aspetta un attimo. Vado a prendere dei fazzoletti.

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Oh... J'ai renversé du café. Avez-vous des mouchoirs ?
Homme : Attendez une minute. Je vais chercher des mouchoirs.

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Oh... derramé café. ¿Tienes pañuelo?
Hombre: Espera un minuto. Iré a buscar un pañuelo.

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Tunggu sebentar. Aku akan mengambil tisu.

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.

男性: ちょっと待ってください。ティッシュを取りに行きます。

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Oh... ich habe Kaffee verschüttet. Hast du Taschentücher?
Mann: Moment mal. Ich hole etwas Taschentuch.

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.

男：等一下。我去拿点纸巾。

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.

ผู้ชาย : รอสักครู่นะครับ ฉันจะไปเอาผ้าเช็ดหน้า

#######

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.

Homem: Espere um minuto. Vou pegar um lenço de papel.

Woman: Oh... I spilled coffee. Do you have tissue?
Man: Wait a minute. I'll go get some tissue.

여자: 원피스가 좀 길었어요. 여기까지만 줄어 주세요.
남자: 네. 이일 후에 찾으러 오세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chiếc váy hơi dài. Hãy cắt ngắn đến đây giúp tôi.
Nam: Vâng. Hai ngày nữa quý khách đến lấy nhé.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: The dress was a bit long. Please shorten it to here.
Man: Okay. Please come pick it up in two days.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Il vestito era un po' lungo. Per favore, abbrevialo qui.
Uomo: Ok. Per favore, vieni a ritirarlo tra due giorni.

#######

Woman: The dress was a bit long. Please shorten it to here.
Man: Okay. Please come pick it up in two days.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : D’accord. Merci de venir le récupérer dans deux jours.

#######

Woman: The dress was a bit long. Please shorten it to here.
Man: Okay. Please come pick it up in two days.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Está bien. Por favor ven a recogerlo en dos días.

Man: Okay. Please come pick it up in two days.

#######

Man: Okay. Please come pick it up in two days.

Mann: Okay. Bitte kommen Sie in zwei Tagen vorbei und holen Sie es ab.

title: 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우산 있어요? 지금 비가 오는데요.
남자: 아....... 우산 안 가져왔는데, 퇴근할 때는 안 오겠죠?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Anh có ô không? Bây giờ trời đang mưa.
Nam: Ồ... tôi không mang ô. Chắc đến giờ tan làm sẽ hết mưa thôi nhỉ?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Hai un ombrello? Sta piovendo adesso.
Uomo: Ah... non ho portato l'ombrello, ma non pioverà quando usciamo dal lavoro, vero?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Avez-vous un parapluie ? Il pleut maintenant.
Homme : Ah... Je n'ai pas apporté de parapluie, mais il ne pleuvra pas quand nous sortirons du travail, n'est-ce pas ?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Ah... No traje paraguas, pero no lloverá cuando salgamos del trabajo, ¿verdad?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Ah... Aku tidak membawa payung, tapi kalau kita pulang kerja tidak akan turun hujan kan?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

男: ああ…傘を持ってきていないけど、仕事が終わる頃には雨は降らないでしょう?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?

Mann: Ah ... ich habe keinen Regenschirm mitgebracht, aber es wird nicht regnen, wenn wir Feierabend haben, oder?

#######

Woman: Do you have an umbrella? It's raining now.
Man: Ah... I didn't bring an umbrella, but it won't rain when we get off work, right?

男：啊……我没带伞，不过下班不会下雨吧？

title: 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 드시고 가실 거예요? 포장해 드릴까요?
남자: 먹고 갈 거예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Tôi ăn tại chỗ.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Are you going to eat here? Or would you like it wrapped?
Man: I'm going to eat here and go.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

Uomo: Mangio qui e vado.

#######

Woman: Are you going to eat here? Or would you like it wrapped?
Man: I'm going to eat here and go.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Je vais manger ici et partir.

#######

Man: I'm going to eat here and go.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Voy a comer aquí y me voy.

#######

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 이것보다 작은 가방 있어요? 
여자: 네, 가게 안에 있어요. 들어와서 보세요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Do you have a bag smaller than this one?
Woman: Yes, it’s in the store. Come in and take a look.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cô có cái túi nào nhỏ hơn cái này không?
Nữ: Vâng, trong cửa hàng có ạ. Mời anh vào xem.

explain.en: The man asks about a bag and the woman invites the man into the store. 1 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Nhân vật nam hỏi về một chiếc túi và nhân vật nữ mời nhân vật nam vào cửa hàng. 1 là đáp án đúng.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 책상 위에 물이 있네요. 
남자: 그럼 이걸로 닦으세요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: There is water on the desk.
Man: Then wipe it with this one.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Có nước trên bàn này.
Nam: Vậy hãy dùng cái này để lau.

explain.en: It can be seen that there is water on the desk, and the man is about to use something to clean it. Thus, 2 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Có thể thấy trên bàn có nước, và nhân vật nam đang chuẩn bị dùng một cái gì đó để lau. 2 là đáp án đúng.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저, 우산은 어디에 있어요? 
여자: 저기 창문 밑에 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Hey, where's the umbrella? 
Woman: It's under the window over there.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Này, cây dù ở đâu vậy?
Nữ: Nó ở dưới cái cửa sổ đằng kia.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
الرجل: أهلاً، أين المظلة؟ 
المرأة: إنه تحت النافذة هناك.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Эй, а где зонтик? 
Женщина: Это там под окном.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Hey, wo ist der Regenschirm? 
Frau: Es ist unter dem Fenster da drüben.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Hé, où est le parapluie ? 
Femme : C'est sous la fenêtre là-bas.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Hei, mana payungnya? 
Wanita: Letaknya di bawah jendela sebelah sana.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Ehi, dov'è l'ombrello? 
Donna: È sotto la finestra laggiù.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: おい、傘はどこだ? 
女性: そこの窓の下にあります。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Ei, onde está o guarda-chuva? 
Mulher: Está ali embaixo da janela.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: เฮ้ ร่มอยู่ไหน? 
ผู้หญิง: มันอยู่ใต้หน้าต่างตรงนั้น
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Hey, şemsiye nerede? 
Kadın: Orada pencerenin altında.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：嘿，伞在哪儿？ 
女：就在那边窗户下面。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：嘿，傘在哪裡？ 
女：就在那邊窗下面。
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: अरे, छाता कहाँ है? 
महिला: वह वहां खिड़की के नीचे है।
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Oye, ¿dónde está el paraguas? 
Mujer: Está debajo de la ventana de allí.

explain.en: The man asks about the location of the umbrella, the woman points to the window. 1 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Nhân vật nam hỏi về vị trí chiếc ô, nhân vật nữ chỉ về hướng cửa sổ. 1 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar: يسأل الرجل عن مكان المظلة، وتشير المرأة إلى النافذة. 1 هو الجواب الصحيح.
explain.ru: Мужчина спрашивает, где находится зонт, женщина указывает на окно. 1 – правильный ответ.
explain.de: Der Mann fragt nach dem Standort des Regenschirms, die Frau zeigt zum Fenster. 1 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr: L'homme demande où se trouve le parapluie, la femme montre la fenêtre. 1 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id: Laki-laki menanyakan letak payung, perempuan menunjuk ke jendela. 1 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it: L'uomo chiede dove si trova l'ombrello, la donna indica la finestra. 1 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja: 男が傘の場所を尋ねると、女は窓を指差した。 1 が正解です。
explain.pt: O homem pergunta sobre a localização do guarda-chuva, a mulher aponta para a janela. 1 é a resposta correta.
explain.th: ผู้ชายถามถึงตำแหน่งของร่ม ผู้หญิงชี้ไปที่หน้าต่าง 1 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr: Adam şemsiyenin yerini soruyor, kadın ise pencereyi işaret ediyor. 1 doğru cevaptır.
explain.zh-CN: 男人询问雨伞的位置，女人指着窗户。 1 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW: 男人詢問雨傘的位置，女人指著窗戶。 1 是正確答案。
explain.hi: पुरुष छाते के स्थान के बारे में पूछता है, महिला खिड़की की ओर इशारा करती है। 1 सही उत्तर है.
explain.es: El hombre pregunta dónde está el paraguas, la mujer señala la ventana. 1 es la respuesta correcta.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우리 15번 버스를 타지요? 
남자: 네. 이 정류장에서 탈 수 있네요.

Nam: Đúng vậy. Có thể lên xe ở bến xe này.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: هل سنستقل الحافلة رقم 15؟ 
الرجل: نعم. يمكننا أن نصل إلى هذه المحطة.

Женщина: Мы поедем на автобусе номер 15? 
Мужчина: Да. Мы можем выйти на этой остановке.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Nehmen wir Bus Nummer 15? 
Mann: Ja. An dieser Haltestelle können wir einsteigen.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : On prend le bus numéro 15 ? 
Homme : Oui. Nous pouvons continuer à cet arrêt.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Apakah kita naik bus nomor 15? 
Pria: Ya. Kita bisa melanjutkan di halte ini.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Prendiamo l'autobus numero 15? 
Uomo: Sì. Possiamo proseguire a questa fermata.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 15 番のバスに乗りますか? 
男性: はい。私たちはこの停留所から乗れます。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Vamos pegar o ônibus número 15? 
Homem: Sim. Podemos continuar nesta parada.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: เรากำลังนั่งรถบัสหมายเลข 15 หรือเปล่า? 
ผู้ชาย: ใช่. เราสามารถลงรถได้ที่ป้ายนี้
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: 15 numaralı otobüse mi bineceğiz? 
Adam: Evet. Bu durakta inebiliriz.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：我们坐15路公交车吗？ 
男：是的。我们可以在这一站上车。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：我們坐15路公車嗎？ 
男：是的。我們可以在這一站上車。
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: क्या हम 15 नंबर की बस ले रहे हैं? 
आदमी: हाँ. हम इस स्टॉप पर आगे बढ़ सकते हैं।
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Vamos a tomar el autobús número 15? 
Hombre: Sí. Podemos subir en esta parada.

explain.en: We can guess that the man and the woman are waiting for bus number 15 together. 4 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Có thể thấy hai nhân vật đang đứng chờ xe bus số 15 cùng nhau. 4 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar: يمكننا أن نخمن أن الرجل والمرأة ينتظران الحافلة رقم 15 معًا. 4 هو الجواب الصحيح.
explain.ru: Можно догадаться, что мужчина и женщина вместе ждут автобус № 15. 4 – правильный ответ.
explain.de: Wir können vermuten, dass der Mann und die Frau gemeinsam auf den Bus Nummer 15 warten. 4 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr: On devine que l'homme et la femme attendent ensemble le bus numéro 15. 4 est la bonne réponse.
explain.id: Kita bisa menebak bahwa pria dan wanita tersebut sedang menunggu bus nomor 15 bersama-sama. 4 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it: Possiamo immaginare che l'uomo e la donna stiano aspettando insieme l'autobus numero 15. 4 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja: 男性と女性は一緒に15番のバスを待っていると推測できます。 4が正解です。
explain.pt: Podemos adivinhar que o homem e a mulher estão esperando juntos o ônibus número 15. 4 é a resposta correta.
explain.th: เดาได้เลยว่าชายและหญิงกำลังรอรถเมล์หมายเลข 15 ด้วยกัน 4 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr: Kadın ve erkeğin birlikte 15 numaralı otobüsü beklediklerini tahmin edebiliyoruz. 4 doğru cevaptır.
explain.zh-CN: 我们可以猜测，男女正在一起等15路公交车。 4 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW: 我們可以猜測，男女正在一起等15路公車。 4 是正確答案。
explain.hi: हम अंदाजा लगा सकते हैं कि महिला और पुरुष एक साथ 15 नंबर बस का इंतजार कर रहे हैं. 4 सही उत्तर है.
explain.es: Podemos suponer que el hombre y la mujer esperan juntos el autobús número 15. 4 es la respuesta correcta.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 저, 우산은 어디에 있어요? 
여자: 저기 창문 밑에 있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Hey, where's the umbrella? 
Woman: It's under the window over there.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Này, cây dù ở đâu vậy?
Nữ: Nó ở dưới cái cửa sổ đằng kia.

explain.en: The man asks about the location of the umbrella, the woman points to the window. 1 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Nhân vật nam hỏi về vị trí chiếc ô, nhân vật nữ chỉ về hướng cửa sổ. 1 là đáp án đúng.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 우리 15번 버스를 타지요? 
남자: 네. 이 정류장에서 탈 수 있네요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Are we taking bus number 15? 
Man: Yes. We can get on at this stop.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chúng ta đi xe buýt số 15 đúng chứ?
Nam: Đúng vậy. Có thể lên xe ở bến xe này.

explain.en: We can guess that the man and the woman are waiting for bus number 15 together. 4 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Có thể thấy hai nhân vật đang đứng chờ xe bus số 15 cùng nhau. 4 là đáp án đúng.

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어서 오세요, 손님. 뭘 도와드릴까요? 
남자: 남자 옷은 몇 층에 있어요?

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Welcome, sir. How may I help you?
Man: Which floor is the men's clothing on?
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Chào mừng quý khách. Tôi có thể giúp gì cho anh?
Nam: Cửa hàng quần áo nam ở tầng nào vậy?
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
المرأة: أهلاً سيدي. كيف أساعدك؟

الرجل: في أي طابق يقع قسم ملابس الرجال؟
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Добро пожаловать, сэр. Чем могу помочь?
Мужчина: На каком этаже мужская одежда?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Herzlich willkommen, Sir. Wie kann ich Ihnen helfen?
Mann: Auf welcher Etage befindet sich die Herrenbekleidungsabteilung?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Bienvenue, monsieur. Comment puis-je vous aider ?
Homme : À quel étage se trouvent les vêtements pour hommes ?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Selamat datang, Tuan. Ada yang bisa saya bantu?
Pria: Pakaian pria ada di lantai berapa?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Benvenuto, signore. Come posso aiutarla?
Uomo: A che piano si trova la guardaroba maschile?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：ようこそいらっしゃいました。何かお探しでしょうか？
男性：紳士服は何階にありますか？
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Bem-vindo, senhor. Como posso ajudá-lo?
Homem: Em que andar fica o setor de roupas masculinas?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ยินดีต้อนรับค่ะ มีอะไรให้ช่วยไหมคะ?
ผู้ชาย: เสื้อผ้าผู้ชายอยู่ชั้นไหนคะ?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Hoş geldiniz efendim. Size nasıl yardımcı olabilirim?
Erkek: Erkek giyim hangi katta?
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbea: Yɛma wo akwaaba, owura. Mɛyɛ dɛn aboa wo?
Ɔbarima: Fam bɛn na mmarima ntade wɔ so?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: स्वागत है, सर। मैं आपकी क्या मदद कर सकती हूँ?
पुरुष: पुरुषों के कपड़े किस मंजिल पर हैं?
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: स्वागत छ, सर। म तपाईंलाई कसरी मद्दत गर्न सक्छु?
पुरुष: पुरुषको लुगा कुन तल्लामा छ?
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ សូមស្វាគមន៍លោកម្ចាស់។ តើខ្ញុំអាចជួយអ្នកដោយរបៀបណា?
បុរស៖ តើសម្លៀកបំពាក់បុរសនៅជាន់ណា?
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: සාදරයෙන් පිළිගන්නවා සර්. මම ඔබට උදව් කරන්නේ කෙසේද?
මිනිසා: පිරිමි ඇඳුම් තියෙන්නේ මොන තට්ටුවේද?
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: স্বাগতম, স্যার। আমি আপনাকে কিভাবে সাহায্য করতে পারি?
পুরুষ: পুরুষদের পোশাক কোন তলায়?
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး : ကြိုဆိုပါတယ်ဆရာ။ ငါ မင်းကို ဘယ်လိုကူညီရမလဲ။
Man : ယောက်ျားဝတ်က ဘယ်အထပ်လဲ။
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Bienvenido, señor. ¿En qué puedo ayudarle?
Hombre: ¿En qué piso está la ropa de hombre?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女士：欢迎光临，先生。请问有什么可以帮您吗？
男士：男装在几楼？
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女士：歡迎光臨，先生。請問有什麼可以幫您嗎？
男士：男裝在幾樓？

explain.en: The man asks the woman where the men's clothing store was. So the woman is a receptionist, and the man has not yet entered the store. 1 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Người đàn ông hỏi người phụ nữ cửa hàng quần áo nam ở đâu. Như vậy người phụ nữ là lễ tân, và người đàn ông vẫn chưa vào cửa hàng. 1 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar: يسأل الرجل المرأة عن محل ملابس الرجال. إذًا، المرأة موظفة استقبال، والرجل لم يدخل المحل بعد. الإجابة الصحيحة هي ١.
explain.ru: Мужчина спрашивает женщину, где находится магазин мужской одежды. Значит, женщина — администратор, а мужчина еще не зашел в магазин. Правильный ответ — 1.
explain.de: Der Mann fragt die Frau, wo das Herrenbekleidungsgeschäft sei. Die Frau ist also eine Empfangsdame, und der Mann hat das Geschäft noch nicht betreten. 1 ist die richtige Antwort.
explain.fr: L'homme demande à la femme où se trouve le magasin de vêtements pour hommes. La femme est donc réceptionniste et l'homme n'est pas encore entré dans le magasin. La bonne réponse est 1.
explain.id: Pria itu bertanya kepada wanita itu di mana toko pakaian pria itu berada. Jadi wanita itu adalah resepsionis, dan pria itu belum memasuki toko itu. 1 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it: L'uomo chiede alla donna dove si trovasse il negozio di abbigliamento maschile. La donna è una receptionist e l'uomo non è ancora entrato nel negozio. 1 è la risposta corretta.
explain.ja: 男性は女性に紳士服店がどこにあったか尋ねます。つまり、女性は受付係で、男性はまだ店に入っていません。正解は1です。
explain.pt: O homem pergunta à mulher onde ficava a loja de roupas masculinas. Então, a mulher é recepcionista, e o homem ainda não entrou na loja. A resposta correta é 1.
explain.th: ผู้ชายถามผู้หญิงว่าร้านขายเสื้อผ้าผู้ชายอยู่ไหน ผู้หญิงคนนั้นเป็นพนักงานต้อนรับ ส่วนผู้ชายคนนั้นยังไม่ได้เข้าไปในร้าน 1 คือคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr: Adam kadına erkek giyim mağazasının nerede olduğunu sorar. Yani kadın resepsiyonisttir ve adam henüz mağazaya girmemiştir. Doğru cevap 1'dir.
explain.tw: Ɔbarima no bisa ɔbea no baabi a na mmarima ntadetɔnbea wɔ. Enti ɔbea no yɛ obi a ogye ahɔho, na ɔbarima no nnya nkɔɔ sotɔɔ no mu. 1 ne mmuae a ɛteɛ.
explain.hi: पुरुष महिला से पूछता है कि पुरुषों के कपड़ों की दुकान कहाँ है। तो महिला रिसेप्शनिस्ट है, और पुरुष अभी तक दुकान में नहीं आया है। 1 सही उत्तर है।
explain.ne: पुरुषले महिलालाई सोध्छ कि पुरुषको कपडा पसल कहाँ थियो। त्यसैले महिला रिसेप्शनिस्ट हुन्, र पुरुष अझै पसलमा प्रवेश गरेको छैन। १ सही उत्तर हो।
explain.km: បុរស​នោះ​សួរ​ស្ត្រី​ថា​កន្លែង​លក់​សម្លៀក​បំពាក់​បុរស​នោះ​នៅ​ឯណា? ដូច្នេះ​ស្ត្រី​ជា​អ្នក​ទទួល​ភ្ញៀវ ហើយ​បុរស​នោះ​មិន​ទាន់​ចូល​ក្នុង​ហាង​នៅឡើយ ។ 1 គឺជាចម្លើយត្រឹមត្រូវ។
explain.si: පිරිමි ඇඳුම් සාප්පුව කොහෙද කියලා පිරිමියා කාන්තාවගෙන් අහනවා. ඉතින් කාන්තාව පිළිගැනීමේ නිලධාරිනියක්, පිරිමියා තවමත් සාප්පුවට ඇතුළු වෙලා නැහැ. 1 තමයි නිවැරදි පිළිතුර.
explain.bn: পুরুষটি মহিলাটিকে জিজ্ঞাসা করে পুরুষদের পোশাকের দোকানটি কোথায় ছিল। তাহলে মহিলাটি একজন রিসেপশনিস্ট, এবং পুরুষটি এখনও দোকানে প্রবেশ করেনি। ১ হল সঠিক উত্তর।
explain.my: ယောက်ျားက မိန်းမကို ယောက်ျားဝတ်ဆိုင်က ဘယ်မှာလဲလို့ မေးတယ်။ ဒါကြောင့် အမျိုးသမီးက Receptionist တစ်ယောက်ဖြစ်ပြီး ယောက်ျားက ဆိုင်ထဲကို မဝင်သေးပါဘူး။ 1 က အဖြေမှန်ပါ။
explain.es: El hombre le pregunta a la mujer dónde estaba la tienda de ropa para hombres. La mujer es recepcionista y el hombre aún no ha entrado. La respuesta correcta es 1.
explain.zh-CN: 男士问女士男装店在哪里。所以女士是前台接待员，男士还没有进店。1 是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW: 男士問女士男裝店在哪裡。所以女士是前台接待員，男士還沒進店。 1 是正確答案。

title: [15~16] 다음 대화를 듣고 알맞은 그림을 고르십시오. (각 4점)

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 수미 씨, 이 사진 여기에 걸까요? 
여자: 음, 조금 더 위에 걸어 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: Sumi, should I hang this photo here?
Woman: Hmm, hang it a little higher.
g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Cô Sumi, tôi treo bức ảnh này ở đây nhé?
Nữ: Ừm, hãy treo cao hơn một chút.
g_text_audio_translate.ar:
الرجل: سومي، هل أعلق هذه الصورة هنا؟
المرأة: همم، علّقيها أعلى قليلًا.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Суми, мне повесить это фото здесь? 
Женщина: Хм, повесь его немного выше.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Sumi, soll ich das Foto hier aufhängen?
Frau: Hmm, häng es etwas höher.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Sumi, dois-je accrocher cette photo ici ?
Femme : Hmm, accroche-la un peu plus haut.
g_text_audio_translate.id: Pria: Sumi, haruskah aku menggantung foto ini di sini? Wanita: Hmm, gantunglah sedikit lebih tinggi.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sumi, dovrei appendere questa foto qui?
Donna: Hmm, appendila un po' più in alto.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性：スミさん、この写真はここに掛けた方がいいですか？
女性：うーん、もう少し高い位置に掛けた方がいいですね。
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Sumi, devo pendurar esta foto aqui?
Mulher: Hmm, pendure um pouco mais alto.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ชาย: สุมิ ฉันควรแขวนรูปนี้ตรงนี้ไหม? 
หญิง: อืม แขวนไว้สูงกว่านี้หน่อย
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Sumi, bu fotoğrafı buraya asayım mı?
Kadın: Hmm, biraz daha yükseğe as.
g_text_audio_translate.tw:
Ɔbarima: Sumi, ɛsɛ sɛ mede mfonini yi sɛn ha?
Ɔbaa: Hmm, sɛn no kɔ soro kakra.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: सुमी, क्या मुझे यह फोटो यहीं टांगना चाहिए?
औरत: हम्म, इसे थोड़ा ऊपर टांगो।
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
पुरुष: सुमी, के म यो फोटो यहाँ झुण्ड्याउनुपर्छ? 
महिला: हम्म, यसलाई अलि माथि झुण्ड्याउनुहोस्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ Sumi តើខ្ញុំគួរព្យួររូបថតនេះនៅទីនេះទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ ហា៎ ព្យួរវាខ្ពស់ជាងបន្តិច។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: සුමී, මම මේ ඡායාරූපය මෙතන එල්ලන්නද? 
කාන්තාව: හ්ම්, ඒක තව ටිකක් උඩින් එල්ලන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: সুমি, আমি কি এই ছবিটি এখানে ঝুলিয়ে দেব? 
মহিলা: হুম, আরেকটু উঁচুতে ঝুলিয়ে রাখো।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : Sumi ၊ ဒီပုံကို ဒီမှာ ဆွဲထားရမလား။
အမျိုးသမီး- ဟမ်၊ အဲဒါကို နည်းနည်းမြင့်အောင် ဆွဲထားပါ။
g_text_audio_translate.es: Hombre: Sumi, ¿cuelgo esta foto aquí? Mujer: Mmm, cuélgala un poco más arriba.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：Sumi，我应该把这张照片挂在这里吗？
女：嗯，挂高一点。
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：Sumi，我該把這張照片掛在這裡嗎？
女：嗯，掛高一點。

explain.en: The man is hanging a photo on the wall. So 2 is the correct answer.
explain.vi: Người đàn ông đang treo ảnh lên tường. Như vậy 2 là đáp án đúng.
explain.ar: الرجل يعلق صورة على الحائط. إذًا، ٢ هو الجواب الصحيح.
explain.ru: Мужчина вешает фотографию на стену. Поэтому правильный ответ — 2.
explain.de: Der Mann hängt ein Foto an die Wand. Die richtige Antwort ist also 2.
explain.fr: L'homme accroche une photo au mur. La bonne réponse est donc 2.
explain.id: Pria itu sedang menggantung foto di dinding. Jadi, 2 adalah jawaban yang benar.
explain.it: L'uomo sta appendendo una foto al muro. Quindi la risposta corretta è 2.
explain.ja: 男性は壁に写真を掛けています。つまり、正解は2です。
explain.pt: O homem está pendurando uma foto na parede. Então 2 é a resposta correta.
explain.th: ผู้ชายกำลังแขวนรูปถ่ายไว้บนผนัง ดังนั้น 2 จึงเป็นคำตอบที่ถูกต้อง
explain.tr: Adam duvara bir fotoğraf asıyor. Yani doğru cevap 2.
explain.tw: Ɔbarima no de mfonini bi asɛn ɔfasu no so. Enti 2 ne mmuae a ɛteɛ.
explain.hi: आदमी दीवार पर एक फोटो लटका रहा है। इसलिए 2 सही उत्तर है।
explain.ne: त्यो मान्छे भित्तामा फोटो टाँसिरहेको छ। त्यसैले २ सही उत्तर हो।
explain.km: បុរសកំពុងព្យួររូបថតនៅលើជញ្ជាំង។ ដូច្នេះ 2 គឺជាចម្លើយត្រឹមត្រូវ។
explain.si: ඒ මනුස්සයා බිත්තියේ ඡායාරූපයක් එල්ලනවා. ඉතින් 2 තමයි නිවැරදි පිළිතුර.
explain.bn: লোকটি দেয়ালে একটি ছবি ঝুলিয়ে রেখেছে। তাহলে 2 সঠিক উত্তর।
explain.my: ယောက်ျားက နံရံမှာ ဓာတ်ပုံတွဲဆွဲနေတယ်။ ဒီတော့ 2 က အဖြေမှန်ပဲ။
explain.es: El hombre está colgando una foto en la pared. Entonces, 2 es la respuesta correcta.
explain.zh-CN: 这位男士在墙上挂了一张照片。所以2是正确答案。
explain.zh-TW: 這位男士在牆上掛了一張照片。所以2是正確答案。
